=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 8/13/03, New York, New York, Hammerstein Ballroom, 2CDR 

Great recording. Unknown lineage and taper

CD1
1 intro, 2 Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano, Tommy on guitar), 3 If You See Her, Say Hello (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on guitar), 4 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano, Tommy on guitar), 5 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on guitar), 6 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano, Tommy on guitar), 7 Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine) (Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on guitar), 8 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern), 9 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano, Tommy on guitar), 10 Desolation Row (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp)


CD2
1 The Wicked Messenger (Bob on piano and harp), 2 Every Grain Of Sand (Bob on piano, Tommy on guitar), 3 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar, Tommy on guitar), 4 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp), 5 Summer Days, (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass, Tommy on guitar), 6 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano, Tommy on guitar), 7 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano, Tommy on guitar) 


Concert # 1548 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 24 of the 2003 US Summer Tour. 2003 concert # 58.
Concert # 47 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & piano), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

7, 9, 13 acoustic with the band.
4, 6, 9, 10, 13 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
7 Larry Campbell (cittern).
1-6, 8, 10, 11, 14-16 Tommy Morrongiello (guitar).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
